item.title: Big Poppa's BBQ 10lb Chili Dog Challenge
item.description: A fun BBQ challenge featuring a massive 10lb chili dog from Big Poppa's BBQ. Big portions, bold flavor, and outdoor food challenge energy.

media:content.media:title: Big Poppa's BBQ 10lb Chili Dog Challenge
media:content.media:description: A fun BBQ challenge featuring a massive 10lb chili dog from Big Poppa's BBQ. Big portions, bold flavor, and outdoor food challenge energy.

item.title: This Burger Never Stood A Chance
item.description: A fun burger challenge featuring a big, flavorful burger and plenty of food challenge energy.

media:content.media:title: This Burger Never Stood A Chance
media:content.media:description: A fun burger challenge featuring a big, flavorful burger and plenty of food challenge energy.

item.title: This Pizza Was Way Bigger Than Expected
item.description: A fun oversized pizza challenge with a huge slice of outdoor-style food excitement and plenty of flavor to go around.

media:content.media:title: This Pizza Was Way Bigger Than Expected
media:content.media:description: A fun oversized pizza challenge with a huge slice of outdoor-style food excitement and plenty of flavor to go around.

item.title: A Lot of Spaghetti Challenge
item.description: A huge spaghetti challenge with plenty of pasta to go around. Would you try this fun, oversized meal?

media:content.media:title: A Lot of Spaghetti Challenge
media:content.media:description: A huge spaghetti challenge with plenty of pasta to go around. Would you try this fun, oversized meal?

item.title: Debbie’s Mega Burrito Challenge
item.description: Debbie takes on a 13lb mega burrito challenge packed with delicious flavor and plenty of fun challenge energy.

media:content.media:title: Debbie’s Mega Burrito Challenge
media:content.media:description: Debbie takes on a 13lb mega burrito challenge packed with delicious flavor and plenty of fun challenge energy.

item.title: I Wasn’t Ready For This!
item.description: A fun food challenge with a big burger and plenty of surprise. Lighthearted, tasty, and all about the challenge experience.

media:content.media:title: I Wasn’t Ready For This!
media:content.media:description: A fun food challenge with a big burger and plenty of surprise. Lighthearted, tasty, and all about the challenge experience.

item.title: Bet $100 Pizza Challenge at Little Caesars
item.description: A fun pizza challenge at Little Caesars with a $100 bet and a race against the clock.

media:content.media:title: Bet $100 Pizza Challenge at Little Caesars
media:content.media:description: A fun pizza challenge at Little Caesars with a $100 bet and a race against the clock.

item.title: Racing the Clock on a Huge Sandwich
item.description: A fun food challenge featuring a huge sandwich and a race against the clock.
